company: Jungheinrich Business Excellence Center Malaysia Sdn. Bhd.
description: Role Summary : We are looking for an Automation Engineer (Frontend) to support the development and delivery of automation and process analysis solutions for internal teams. In this role, you will work on frontend automation tasks, help with the rollout of process mining tools, and support the creation of clear and practical dashboards from process data. You will work with colleagues across regions to support process improvements, contribute to datadriven insights, and assist in the ongoing development of automation services. Key Responsibilities Work on automation and analysis activities that improve process transparency and reporting Perform root cause analysis and problem management for backup incidents Drive automation and standardization of backup processes (PowerShell, REST API) Support architecture and design of the Veeam Backup platform (multi-tenant, security, upgrades) Conduct regular restoration and disaster recovery tests, ensure audit readiness Coach and support L2 engineers, contribute to knowledge base and documentation Collaborate with international teams and stakeholders to ensure SLA compliance Core Skills Consolidation of the requirements for a process mining tool Evaluation of the tool market and creation of a recommendation for action Support of an RFI and RFQ Determination of the technology and platform decision Project management for the implementation of the tool Development of a process mining service for internal customers such as global process owners Further development of the service along the SAP S4Hana rollouts Knowledge transfer within the department Build Process Analysis Dashboards Analyze Processes Personal Skills and Education Technical qualifications Has technical background with a degree in computer science, business informatics, data science, or a related field Experienced in data-driven process analysis and process mining platforms (e.g. Celonis), including process automation tools Good working knowledge of SQL and statistics; experience with Python or R is an advantage Hands-on experience with frontend and visualization tools such as Power BI or Tableau Experienced in supporting the introduction and development of process mining or analytics solutions, including project and process management methods Practicing strong analytical approach, able to work independently while collaborating effectively and documenting requirements through structured workshops.
